name: profitmax
goal: Maximize profitable automated business operations with OpenClaw as the operator control plane.

agency.purpose: reusable role prompts, project orchestration, QA loops

playwright.purpose: Inspect live funnels, scrape positioning, validate landing pages, and verify competitor flows.

spreadsheet.purpose: Model unit economics, pricing, CAC/LTV assumptions, and offer profitability.

notion-research-documentation.purpose: Capture market research, account briefs, and competitor intelligence into reusable docs.

notion-knowledge-capture.purpose: Turn winning workflows and decisions into SOPs that operators can reuse.

linear.purpose: Convert profitable ideas into execution queues, owners, and operational follow-through.

vercel-react-best-practices.purpose: Tighten landing page speed and conversion surfaces when engineering ships growth pages.

lead_qualification.name: Lead Qualification
lead_qualification.summary: Turn inbound lead signals into a qualification verdict, response draft, and next revenue action.
execution_prompt: Qualify the lead against ICP fit, urgency, budget potential, and ease of close.
Prioritize booked revenue and short sales cycles over vanity opportunities.
Recommend one next action with the highest expected return.
output_requirements: A short summary of the lead.
An ICP fit score from 1 to 10.
A qualification verdict: disqualify, nurture, sales_call, or proposal.
A draft reply the operator can send.

outbound_personalization.name: Outbound Personalization
outbound_personalization.summary: Build personalized outreach angles, hooks, and messaging for a target account or segment.
execution_prompt: Find the most credible business pain and tie the offer to measurable upside.
Avoid generic agency language and empty flattery.
Produce messaging that can be used in email, DM, and landing-page copy.
output_requirements: A CTA with a clear commercial next step.

offer_pricing_review.name: Offer Pricing Review
offer_pricing_review.summary: Review an offer, its pricing, and delivery model to improve margin, close-rate, and cash generation.
execution_prompt: Balance margin improvement with close-rate and delivery feasibility.
Prefer pricing changes that increase cash collected quickly and reduce fulfillment drag.
Call out what should change now versus what needs more evidence.
output_requirements: A pricing verdict: keep, raise, repackage, or simplify.
A test plan for the next sales cycle.
The expected upside if the recommendation works.
